subcodes.first_line: Know, O my God, that the Dawning-Place of Revelation hath gone forth from His prosperous dwelling, directing His steps toward the house of His brother who was named [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعلم یا الهی بان مطلع الظهور طلع من بیته المعمور متوجها الی بیت اخیه الذی سمی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @presence of; reunion with God, @banishment to; life in Adrianople, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
